emails.subject: checking in
emails.body: checking in Jeff: OPEC meeting was crazy. Saudis are behaving strangely; they seem like they really don't have their act together. It looks bearish for the time being WTI in the teens over the next few months unless war fears take it up. I'm stopping in DC on the way home and will see you on Monday. Hopefully we can talk shop sometime. Clay

emails.subject: RE: checking in
emails.body: RE: checking in thanks for the email. wti in the teens to say the least. what a piece of Swing by tomorrow when you can. Dynegy has expressed interest in crude and products, and you work is need now through the merger at the very least. Hang in there. Jeff To: Shankman, Jeffrey A.

emails.subject: RE: checking in
emails.body: I'm in DC today and Friday but Jennifer has me penciled in with you on Monday at 10 am. Thanks Clay
